14_all_features_combined.description: Ultimate test with all features combined

curl_examples.girlboss_curl:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/encode \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "url": "https://sample-videos.com/zip/10/mp4/SampleVideo_1280x720_1mb.mp4",
    "outputName": "girlboss_test",
    "format": "mp4",
    "caption": {
      "srtContent": "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:03,000\nGirlboss Energy!\n\n2\n00:00:03,000 --> 00:00:06,000\nShake it up!",
      "subtitleStyle": "girlboss",
      "fontSize": 48,
      "girlbossColor": "#FF1493",
      "girlbossAnimation": "shake"
    }
  }' \
  --output girlboss_video.mp4
curl_examples.hormozi_curl:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/encode \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "url": "https://sample-videos.com/zip/10/mp4/SampleVideo_1280x720_1mb.mp4",
    "outputName": "hormozi_test",
    "format": "mp4",
    "caption": {
      "srtContent": "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:02,000\nATTENTION!\n\n2\n00:00:02,000 --> 00:00:05,000\nThis will BLOW your mind!",
      "subtitleStyle": "hormozi",
      "fontSize": 52,
      "hormoziColors": ["#00FF00", "#FF0000", "#0080FF", "#FFFF00"]
    }
  }' \
  --output hormozi_video.mp4
curl_examples.single_word_curl:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/encode \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "url": "https://sample-videos.com/zip/10/mp4/SampleVideo_1280x720_1mb.mp4",
    "outputName": "single_word_test",
    "format": "mp4",
    "caption": {
      "srtContent": "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:06,000\nThis is amazing single word mode\n\n2\n00:00:06,000 --> 00:00:12,000\nEach word appears individually",
      "subtitleStyle": "girlboss",
      "fontSize": 48,
      "girlbossColor": "#FF1493",
      "wordMode": "single",
      "wordsPerGroup": 1
    }
  }' \
  --output single_word_video.mp4
curl_examples.multiple_word_curl:
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/encode \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "url": "https://sample-videos.com/zip/10/mp4/SampleVideo_1280x720_1mb.mp4",
    "outputName": "multiple_word_test",
    "format": "mp4",
    "caption": {
      "srtContent": "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:08,000\nThis demonstrates multiple word grouping functionality\n\n2\n00:00:08,000 --> 00:00:16,000\nWords appear in groups for better reading flow",
      "subtitleStyle": "hormozi",
      "fontSize": 50,
      "hormoziColors": ["#00FF00", "#FF0000", "#0080FF", "#FFFF00"],
      "wordMode": "multiple",
      "wordsPerGroup": 3
    }
  }' \
  --output multiple_word_video.mp4
